code:
import io
import string

mut found = false
mut result = ""

while not found
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let trimmed = string.trim(line)
    if not string.is_empty(trimmed)
      result = trimmed
      found = true
    end
  when None
    println("(none)")
    return
  end
end

println(result)
